subcodes.first_line: The Book from Our presence unto him who hath turned and believed in God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. Fix thy gaze upon naught save the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا الی الذی اقبل و آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم الا تنظر الا الافق
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @love of God, @praise and encouragement
